serviceDescription: AWS offers training resources so you can get more out of the Cloud, faster. Offerings include instructor-led courses delivered virtually or in-person. For more information on private pricing and course topics, see the AWS Training Page. Please note that pricing displayed is the base pricing and does not include contractual exceptions.
